title: Spain Orders Blacklist of Palantir from Public and Private Companies
author: mgh2
aiHeadline: Spain takes a stand against tech giants by banning Palantir, proving that sometimes the best offense is a good blacklist.

title: Virginia bans sale of geolocation data
author: toomuchtodo
aiHeadline: Virginia leads the charge in privacy rights by banning the sale of geolocation data, because who needs to know where you are anyway?

title: PeerTube is a free, decentralized and federated video platform
author: doener
aiHeadline: PeerTube: the decentralized video platform that proves you don't need a billion-dollar company to make a video platform, just a bunch of volunteers and a sense of humor.

title: The Egg Bandits Made a Thousand Times the Fine They Just Paid for Price Fixing
author: toomuchtodo
aiHeadline: The Egg Bandits: because when the law says 'don't fix prices,' they say 'challenge accepted,' and now they're laughing all the way to the bank.

title: How to ask for help from people who don't know you
author: FigurativeVoid
aiHeadline: How to ask for help from people who don't know you: because sometimes you need to be bold, and sometimes you just need to swallow your pride.
